TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cinbulan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 324 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 295 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 29 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 85%, Amis 2%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cinbulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Cinbulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cinbulan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cinbulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Cinbulan hya' ga Kbaqeh. tay mkyahu' na Cinbulan hya' ga Ageq. tay 'llaw na Cinbulan hya' ga Kuxan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨinβulan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa kβaqeħ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa aɣeq. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa kuxan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cinbulan ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 324 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 295 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 29 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 85%, Amis 2%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cinbulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Cinbulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cinbulan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cinbulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Cinbulan hya' ga Kbaqeh. tay mkyahu' na Cinbulan hya' ga Ageq. tay 'llaw na Cinbulan hya' ga Kuxan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨinβulan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa kβaqeħ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa aɣeq. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨinβulan ħjaʔ ɣa kuxan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
